tonePrompts.empathic: Tali atu ma le agaalofa, ia amanaʻia lagona o le isi tagata.

sip.title: Telefoni SIP
sip.subtitle: Fa'atulagaina o ogalaau mo telefoni e ulufale mai ma telefoni e alu ese atu
sip.passwordChangeLabel: Upu faataga fou (tu'u avanoa ina ia aua ne'i suia)

incoming.heading: Telefoni SIP o lo'o ulufale mai
incoming.lead: O se tuatusi SIP tulaga ese mo le lafoina o telefoni mai fafo mai lau kamupani tautua i le polokalama VibeVox.
incoming.emptyTitle: E le'i faia le tuatusi SIP e ulufale mai
incoming.emptyHint: Fausia se SIP URI tulaga ese + login/upu faataga ina ia mafai e tagata faatau ona valaau atu ia te oe mai soo se telefoni, ona otometi lava lea ona faaliliuina e VibeVox lou leo i le taimi moni.
incoming.create: Fausia se tuatusi SIP mo telefoni e ulufale mai
incoming.active: O lo'o maua telefoni o lo'o ulufale mai.
incoming.paused: Ua faia le tuatusi SIP, ua taofia le fa'afeiloa'iga
incoming.activeHint: E fa'alogologo le fa'aliliu upu o le Bridge i le potu. O vala'au uma e fa'aliliuina i le taimi moni lava.
incoming.pausedHint: Fa'agaoioi le taliaina ina ia mafai ai e le VibeVox ona fa'aliliuina telefoni o lo'o o'o mai.
incoming.createdToast: Ua faia le tuatusi SIP ulufale
incoming.deletedToast: Ua aveese le tuatusi SIP e ulufale mai
incoming.createFailed: Ua le manuia le fatuina o le tuatusi SIP
incoming.activated: Ua fa'agaoioia le avanoa e talia ai
incoming.toggleFailed: Ua le manuia le suiina o le taliaina

outbound.heading: Telefoni e alu ese ai
outbound.lead: Valaau se numera telefoni mai le upega tafaʻilagi ma o le a otometi lava ona faʻaliliuina e VibeVox lau talanoaga i le taimi moni.
outbound.noTrunkTitle: Muamua, fa'atulaga se SIP Trunk e alu ese atu
outbound.noTrunkHint: Fa'atumu le pepa "New SIP Trunk" i le pito i luga o le itulau - o le a fa'aogaina e VibeVox lau tautua SIP (Zadarma, OnlinePBX, ma isi) mo telefoni e alu ese atu.
outbound.languageLabel: Gagana a le tagata e taliaina le telefoni
outbound.configureFirst: Muamua, fa'atulaga se ogalaau SIP e alu ese atu (pepa i luga)
outbound.invalidNumber: Fa'amolemole tusi le numera sa'o i le faatulagaga fa'avaomalo (+XXXXXXXXXXXX)
outbound.calling: O loʻo matou valaʻau atu iā {{number}}…
outbound.callFailed: Ua le mafai ona faia se telefoni

howTo.heading: Auala e fa'atulaga ai
howTo.step1: Ia maua fa'amaoniga o le SIP Trunk mai lau tautua (Zadarma, OnlinePBX, Asterisk).
howTo.step2: Tuu i totonu i le pepa o loʻo i luga ma sefe.
howTo.step3: O le a otometi lava ona fatuina e VibeVox se SIP Trunk e alu ese atu i le LiveKit Cloud.
howTo.step4: O le a vave ona oo mai: SIP URI o loʻo sau mo le faʻaliliuina o valaʻau mai fafo.

toasts.saved: Ua sefeina fa'atulagaga o le SIP Trunk
toasts.saveFailed: Ua le mafai ona sefe le Trunk
toasts.deleteFailed: Ua le mafai ona tapeina le ogalaau
toasts.loadFailed: Ua le manuia le utaina o fa'atulagaga SIP: {{error}}

tenantOnly.title: O lo'o fa'atulagaina SIP Trunk i le tulaga o le tenant
tenantOnly.hint1: E le mafai ona fa'atulagaina le telefoni SIP i lalo o se tala superadmin (e aunoa ma se UUID a le tenant).
tenantOnly.hint2: Ulufale o se tagata faʻaoga masani e iai lana lava tenantId e fatu ai se ogalaau.

sip.connected: Ua sefe ma fa'amaopoopoina le SIP Trunk ma le LiveKit

sections.providerData: Fa'amatalaga mo lau kamupani e tu'uina atu le SIP

danger.deleteTrunkHint: O le a tapeina le fa'atulagaga. O le a taofi vala'au e alu ese se'ia e toe faia le ogalaau.
danger.deleteInbound: Aveese le tuatusi SIP mo telefoni e ulufale mai
danger.deleteInboundHint: O le tulafono o le LiveKit inbound trunk ma le dispatch o le a aveeseina. O telefoni e ulufale mai o le a le toe mauaina.
danger.reissueHint: Toe tu'uina atu le login ma le upu faataga mo le tuatusi SIP. O fa'amatalaga tuai o le a le toe aoga.

outbound2.rateInfo: O le tau i le minute o se telefoni alu ese e fuafuaina e lau kamupani SIP.

confirm.deleteTrunkBody: E lē mafai ona toe fa'afo'isia lenei gaioiga. A uma ona tapeina, o le a taofi telefoni e alu ese se'ia faia se isi ogalaau fou.
confirm.deleteInboundTitle: Aveese le tuatusi SIP mo ē ulufale mai?
confirm.deleteInboundBody: E lē mafai ona toe fa'afo'isia lenei gaioiga. O le tulafono o le inbound trunk ma le dispatch i le LiveKit Cloud o le a tapeina.

page.title: Fa'atulagaga Enterprise
page.subtitle: O feso'ota'iga uma, ki, ma fa'atulagaga AI mo lau teugatupe
page.upsellTitle: O lo'o maua lenei vaega i le fuafuaga Enterprise.
page.upsellBody: O iinei e mafai ona e faʻatulagaina: se ki Gemini API patino, se faʻamatalaga ma se faʻavae o le malamalama, fesoʻotaʻiga ma le Quest Flow + Telegram bot, ma le fesoʻotaʻi atu i le Chatwoot CRM.

common.savedPlaceholder: Ua sefe (fa'aofi se mea fou e sui ai)

apiKey.savedPlaceholder: Ua sefe (fa'aofi se mea fou e sui ai)

gemini.heading: Ki API a le Google Gemini
gemini.lead: O se ki patino mai le AI Studio. O lenei mea e suitulaga i le ki lautele mo telefoni uma a Gemini i lau teugatupe.
gemini.leadSuffix: . Fa'aaogaina nai lo le fa'aaogaina fa'avaomalo mo vala'au uma a Gemini i lau teugatupe.
gemini.errEnterKey: Ulufale i lau ki API Gemini
gemini.successSavedValidated: Ua sefe ma ua fa'amaonia le ki – ua aoga.
gemini.successSavedWithIssue: Ua sefe, ae o loʻo faʻamaonia: {{error}}
gemini.successValid: E aoga le ki - ua avanoa le Gemini API.
gemini.successDeleted: Ua aveese le ki o le tagata mautotogi.
gemini.confirmDeleteTitle: Tape le ki Gemini i le tagata mautotogi?
gemini.confirmDeleteBody: O galuega faatino a le AI o le a faʻaaogaina le ki faʻasoa a le VibeVox (pe afai e faʻatulagaina).

telegram.heading: Telegram bot mo faʻamatalaga
telegram.lead: Fausia se bot i le @BotFather ma fa'aofi lana token. So'o se tasi e fe'au atu i lenei bot i le /start o le a maua ni fa'asilasilaga: tagata fa'atau fou, pine, mea sese i le feso'ota'iga. E mafai ona e lesitalaina le tele o tagata faigaluega pe fa'aopoopo le bot i se vaega po'o se auala—o fa'asilasilaga o le a otometi lava ona auina atu i tagata uma.
telegram.leadAllWhoStart: O i latou uma e tusi i lenei bot
telegram.leadAfterStart: , o le a maua faʻamatalaga e uiga i tagata fou faʻatau, pine, ma mea sese o le tuʻufaʻatasia. E mafai ona e lesitalaina le tele o tagata faigaluega pe faʻaopoopo le bot i se vaega poʻo se auala—o le a otometi lava ona maua e tagata uma le faʻamatalaga.
telegram.tokenLabel: Fa'ailoga o le bot a le Telegram
telegram.botUnlink: Tatala le sootaga o le bot
telegram.errEnterToken: Fa'aofi le fa'ailoga o le bot
telegram.successSavedWithBroadcast: ✓ Ua sefe le bot @{{username}}. Ua momoli atu le fa'afeiloa'iga i ē lesitala i le {{sent}}.
telegram.successSavedNoBroadcast: ✓ Ua sefe le Bot @{{username}}. O so'o se tasi e tesi mai /start o le a maua fa'asilasilaga.
telegram.successTestSingle: ✓ Ua taunuu le savali. Siaki le Telegram.
telegram.successTestMany: ✓ Ua tu'uina atu le savali i ē e mauaina le {{count}}. Fa'amolemole siaki le Telegram.
telegram.testTooltip: Auina atu se fa'asilasilaga mo se suega e ala i le bot
telegram.confirmUnlinkTitle: Aveese le sootaga o le bot?
telegram.confirmUnlinkBody: O le a aveeseina fo'i i latou e lesitala - o le a lē toe oo mai fa'amatalaga.
telegram.lastBroadcast: Meli lata mai: na tuʻuina atu {{sent}} mai {{total}}

imageModel.heading: Image generation model
imageModel.lead: Single model for the whole account, used ONLY for image generation/editing in Quest Flow. Translation and recognition keep their own model.
imageModel.needKey: Sefe ma fa'amaonia muamua le ki API — e mana'omia le faia o ata.
imageModel.hint: E faia e Nano Banana le gaosiga, fa'asa'oina ma le tu'ufa'atasiga. E na'o le gaosia e le Imagen mai le amataga.

prompt.heading: Fautuaga
prompt.subtitle: Fa'atonuga ma le fa'avae o le malamalama mo le fa'aliliuina o tusitusiga i totonu o potu vitio
prompt.warning: Aua ne'i fenumiai ma le Quest Flow
prompt.promptLabel: Fa'aosofiaga a le polokalama (leo, sitaili, upu)
prompt.kbLabel: Fa'avae o le malamalama (talaaga o le kamupani, Fesili e Masani Ona Fesiligia, mea moni)
prompt.showDefault: O le ā e faʻaaogaina e le AI i le tulaga masani?
prompt.appendNote: E mafai ona e faʻaopoopoina au lava tulafono - o le a tuʻufaʻatasia ma tulafono masani.
prompt.headerLeadPart1: O le vaega lea e faʻaaogaina
prompt.headerLeadBold1: na'o le fa'aliliuina o savali i totonu o potu vitio
prompt.headerLeadPart2: - pe a e kiliki i se savali i se talatalanoaga ma filifili se leo
prompt.contextLeadPart1: E fa'aaogaina pe a e kiliki i se savali i se talanoaga i le potu vitio ma filifili se leo
prompt.contextLeadPart2: O loʻo faʻafefiloi foʻi le faʻavae o le malamalama i totonu (i lalo).
prompt.defaultSummary: O le mea e faʻaaogaina e le AI i le tulaga masani (pe afai e gaogao lau fanua) - kiliki e matamata
prompt.extendNoteText: fa'atasi ai ma a latou lava tulafono/sitaili/fa'aupuga - o le a tu'ufa'atasia ma le fa'atonuga masani o lo'o i luga ma le fa'avae o le malamalama.
prompt.errLoadSettings: Ua lē mafai ona utaina fa'atulagaga
prompt.kbHeading: Fa'avae o le Malamalama — TXT / Word / Excel / CSV
prompt.kbLead: Lafo i luga se pepa—lisi o fa'amatalaga, Fesili e Masani Ona Fesiligia (FAQ), lisi o tau, tulafono faatonutonu, po'o ni fesoasoani. O anotusi e iloiloina i luga o le 'au'aunaga (Word/Excel/CSV → tusitusiga) ma tu'ufa'atasia e le AI pe a tusia savali i potu vitio. Tapula'a: 50 MB faila / 500,000 mata'itusi i le fa'amaumauga.
prompt.kbDeleteTitle: Tape le fa'avae o le malamalama
prompt.successFileUploaded: Ua uta le faila "{{filename}}" ({{format}}) - ua sefeina mataitusi {{kbLength}}.
prompt.successKbCleared: Ua fa'amamāina le fa'avae o le malamalama.
prompt.errLoadFile: Ua le manuia le lafoina o le faila
prompt.confirmKbDeleteTitle: Tape le fa'avae o le malamalama?
prompt.confirmKbDeleteBody: O pepa uma ua lafoina i luga o le a mou atu. E le mafai ona toe faaleaogaina lenei gaioiga.
prompt.presetsLeadPart1: I le talanoaga a le Enterprise Room, e mafai ona e fa'ailogaina so'o se savali ma fai atu i le AI e fa'amatala mai i le leo ua filifilia. Fa'amau
prompt.presetsLeadPart2: fa'aaoga lau fa'atonuga mai le fanua o lo'o i luga.

questFlow.heading: Quest Flow
questFlow.subtitle: Tali atu a le AI i tagata faʻatau e ala i bots Telegram ma le Inbound API
questFlow.warning: Afai e gaogao le fanua, e faʻaaogaina le faʻatonuga lautele a le VibeVox.
questFlow.promptLabel: Fa'aosofiaga o le Faiga Quest Flow
questFlow.kbLabel: Fa'avae o le Malamalama Quest Flow
questFlow.headerLead: Talanoaga fa'a-AI ma tagata fa'atau ta'ito'atasi e ala i se bot Telegram e feso'ota'i ma le Quest Flow.
questFlow.keysLead: O ki taitasi o se mealilo e te fa'aofiina i totonu o le poloka HTTP Quest Flow o se filifili. E fa'aaogaina e VibeVox e fa'ailoa ai lau teugatupe. E mafai ona e fatuina ni ki se tele mo filifili eseese.
questFlow.keyLabelPlaceholder: Fa'ailoga (filifiliga), mo se fa'ata'ita'iga: "Prod bot clinic"
questFlow.createdWarning: ⚠ Sefe le ki - e na'o le fa'atasi ona fa'aalia
questFlow.noKeysHint: E leai ni ki i le taimi nei. Fausia le muamua.
questFlow.confirmRevokeBody: O le a taofia le galue o le Quest Flow i totonu.
questFlow.promptHeading: Fa'aoso mo talanoaga i le Telegram
questFlow.promptLead1: Fuafuaina le AUALA e fesootaʻi ai le AI ma tagata faʻatau e ala i le Quest Flow: le leo, sitaili, ma mea e faʻailoa mai.
questFlow.promptLead2: — o loʻo faʻaaogaina le faʻatonuga lautele a le VibeVox (i lalo).
questFlow.promptLead3: - o le a tuʻufaʻatasia ma le faʻatonuga faʻavae ma le faʻavae o le malamalama.
questFlow.defaultSummary: O le mea e faʻaaogaina e le AI i le tulaga masani (pe afai e gaogao lau fanua) - kiliki e matamata
questFlow.successPromptSaved: Ua sefe le fa'amatalaga Quest Flow.
questFlow.kbHeading: Fa'avae o le Malamalama mo Quest Flow
questFlow.kbLead1: Pepa aloaia – lisi o tautua, lisi o tau, Fesili e Masani Ona Fesiligia. La'u i luga le TXT / Word / Excel / CSV.
questFlow.kbLead2: — o le a leai ni faʻamatalaga a le kamupani i le AI; o le a naʻo le tali atu e faʻavae i luga o le malamalama lautele. O lenei faʻavae
questFlow.kbLead3: Mai le vaega "Fautuaga"—mo le fa'aliliuina o vitio. Tapula'a: 50 MB faila / 500,000 mata'itusi i totonu o le fa'amaumauga.
questFlow.successKbCleared: Ua fa'amamāina le fa'avae o le malamalama.
questFlow.confirmKbDeleteTitle: Tape le fa'avae o le malamalama?
questFlow.confirmKbDeleteBody: O le a fa'amamāina le fa'avae o le malamalama Quest Flow. E le mafai ona toe fa'aleaogaina lenei gaioiga.
questFlow.tagsLead: E tofia e le AI nei pine i tagata faʻatau pe a iloa se mea e fetaui i le talanoaga. O pine e faʻaalia i luga o le kata o le potu o le tagata faʻatau ma tuʻuina atu i le CRM (Vaega 4).
questFlow.confirmDeleteBody: O le a tapeina le ki e faavavau. O le a le toe galue le Quest Flow e ala i ai — e tatau ona e fatuina se ki fou ma sui i le tafe.

chatwoot.heading: Feso'ota'iga CRM (Chatwoot)
chatwoot.subtitle: Auina atu otometi lava le talafaasolopito o telefoni ma pine i Chatwoot.
chatwoot.urlLabel: URL o le Chatwoot (mo se faʻataʻitaʻiga, https://app.chatwoot.com)
chatwoot.headerLead: Fa'aliliuina le tala'aga o talanoaga ma fa'ailoga mana'omia e tagata fa'atau i le Chatwoot CRM
chatwoot.urlFieldLabel: URL a le Chatwoot (e talimalo oe lava ia pe app.chatwoot.com)
chatwoot.tokenFieldLabel: Fa'ailoga o le Avanoa mo Sui (mai le Talaaga → Fa'ailoga o le Avanoa)
chatwoot.testSuccess: O lo'o galue le feso'ota'iga - o lo'o tali mai Chatwoot.
chatwoot.successSaved: Ua sefe. Kiliki nei le "Su'ega Feso'ota'iga" e siaki ai.
chatwoot.errLoad: Ua lē mafai ona utaina fa'atulagaga
chatwoot.whatSentHeading: O le a le mea o loʻo faʻasalalauina i Chatwoot
chatwoot.whatSentItem1: Feso'ota'iga ma le kalani (e ala i le telegram_user_id, fa'atasi ai ma custom_attributes)
chatwoot.whatSentItem2: Talanoaga ma se fa'amatalaga patino = tala'aga atoa o talanoaga
chatwoot.whatSentItem3Prefix: O fa'ailoga uma ua atofaina o mana'oga i totonu
chatwoot.whatSentFooter: Auina atu pe a e kiliki lima i le "Auina atu i le CRM" i le talanoaga i le potu. O le isi vaega e sosoo ai o le auina atu otometi pe a iloa le pine.
chatwoot.docsLabel: Pepa Fa'amaumauga o le Chatwoot API

imagePresets.heading: Image processing blocks
imagePresets.lead: Each block is a preset: a function + prompt + (optional) reference images. The bot button in Quest Flow sends this preset's key, and VibeVox transforms the image with exactly this preset — the AI chooses nothing.
imagePresets.modelHint: change it in the Gemini API section
imagePresets.empty: No blocks yet. Add the first one.
imagePresets.confirmDeleteBody: The block will be removed after you save.
imagePresets.labelPlaceholder: Block name, e.g. “Try on our jacket”
imagePresets.presetKeyLabel: Preset key (paste into the Quest Flow button)
imagePresets.promptExtraLabel: Extra prompt (added to the function's base prompt)
imagePresets.intakeLabel: How the bot asks the client for inputs
imagePresets.intakePlaceholder: e.g. Send a full-height photo of yourself
imagePresets.replyCaptionPlaceholder: Text sent to the client together with the image
imagePresets.referenceHint: Fixed images always added to this block's generation.
imagePresets.referenceMaxHint: Up to {{max}} images for the current model.

mcp.heading: MCP — connect external AI agents / CRM
mcp.lead: Generate an individual key and connect this account to any MCP-compatible agent (Claude, ChatGPT connectors, n8n, your own agent). Two-way: read leads/dialogs and perform actions.
mcp.urlHint: Paste this URL + the key into your agent's MCP settings.
mcp.keysLead: Each key is bound to this account and carries the scopes you select. The raw key is shown once.
mcp.createdWarning: Copy the key now — it is shown only once.
mcp.noKeys: No keys yet. Create the first one.
mcp.confirmDeleteBody: Agents using this key will lose access immediately.
mcp.howToBody: In your agent/CRM add a remote MCP server: the URL above + header Authorization: Bearer <your key>. The agent sees only the tools your scopes allow.

chat.openWithClient: Tatala se talatalanoaga ma le tagata faʻatau
chat.composerPlaceholder: Tusi se savali i le tagata faʻatau…
chat.deleteMessageConfirmText: E le mafai ona toe faaleaogaina lenei gaioiga. O le a tapeina tusitusiga ma ala o faasalalauga ua faapipii atu.
chat.deleteMessageConfirmMediaNote: O le a tapeina fo'i le faila faaletino mai le 'au'aunaga.
chat.enterpriseOnlyHint: O potu talatalanoaga o se vaega Enterprise. Fa'aleleia lau fuafuaga i le vaega "Fuafuaga".
chat.deleteFailed: Ua le mafai ona tapeina le savali
chat.empty: Leai ni fe'au i lenei talatalanoaga.
chat.fromTranscript: Mai le tusitusiga o le telefoni
chat.explainTone: Fa'amatala i le leo ua filifilia

insights.title: Iloiloga o talanoaga
insights.tooShort: E pu'upu'u tele le talanoaga mo se iloiloga.
insights.thinking: E iloilo e le AI talanoaga...

lobby.title: Auai i se fonotaga vitio
lobby.subtitle: Telefoni vitio ma le faaliliuga fa'atasi a le AI
lobby.languageHint: O le a e faalogo ma vaai i faamatalaga mai lau uo i lea gagana.
lobby.shareHint: Kopi ma lafo i lau uo e valaʻaulia i latou i se fonotaga.
lobby.tosAgree: I le auai ua e malie i ai
lobby.privacy: Faiga Faavae mo le Tulaga Faalilolilo
lobby.audioConsent: , ma ua malie fo'i i le fa'agasologaina o leo mo le fa'aliliuga.
lobby.roomFullMsg: Ua i ai se tasi o loo auai i le fonotaga. Faafesootai le na faia le fonotaga pe talosaga mo se tasi fou.
lobby.shareSuccessHint: ✓ Ua kopiina le so'otaga. Auina atu i lau feso'ota'iga e ala i le Telegram / WhatsApp / Imeli. E mafai ona e tapunia le itulau nei—e galue pea lava pea le so'otaga.
lobby.overloadedMsg: Too many translations are running right now. Wait a minute and try again — a slot will free up and you'll get in.

paywall.titleNoSub: Ina ia fatuina se potu, faamolemole lesitala mo se fuafuaga
paywall.titleLowBalance: Ua leai ni minute o totoe i lau paleni - lesitala mo se fuafuaga pe fa'atau nisi
paywall.subtitle: Filifili se fuafuaga pe fa'atau ni minute fa'aopoopo - totogi e ala i le Stripe, toe fa'afo'i vave lau tupe iinei.
paywall.topupNote: O le a fa'aopoopoina minute i lau paleni i le taimi lava e uma ai ona totogi.
paywall.topupNoSubInfo: ℹ E leai sau saofaga o lo'o galue. O le a fa'aopoopoina fo'i i lau fa'atauga mo le €19/masina—e aofia ai minute e 60 i lau fuafuaga, o lea e leai se totogi fa'aopoopo.
paywall.topupPlusLine: Fa'aopoopo le Tau ({{count}} min e aofia ai)
paywall.topupFreeLine: ↳ {{count}} min e leai se totogi ma le tau
paywall.stripeNote: O lo'o puipuia totogi e Stripe. E otometi lava ona fa'aopoopoina minute pe a uma ona totogi.
paywall.previewFailed: Le mafai ona fuafua le tau
paywall.checkoutFailed: E le mafai ona tatala le Stripe Checkout

billingPage.title: Fuafuaga ma totogi
billingPage.subtitle: O vaega uma o VibeVox — filifili se fuafuaga e fetaui ma lou saoasaoa o le galuega.
billingPage.untilEndOfPeriod: se'ia o'o i le fa'ai'uga o le vaitaimi totogi
billingPage.cancelAutoRenewQuestion: Faaleaogaina le fa'afouina otometi o lau saofaga?
billingPage.cancelTooltip: Faaleaoga le faafouga otometi. O le a tumau pea le aoga o lau saofaga seia oo i le faaiuga o le vaitaimi o loo iai nei.
billingPage.canceled: Ua fa'ailogaina le lesitalaina mo le fa'aleaogaina
billingPage.cancelFailed: Le mafai ona faaleaogaina le lesitala
billingPage.resumeAutoRenewQuestion: Toe fa'aauau le fa'afouina otometi o le lesitala?
billingPage.resumeNextChargeNote: O le isi totogi o le a faia i le faaiuga o le vaitaimi o loʻo iai nei.
billingPage.resumeTooltip: Toe amata le fa'afouina otometi o le lesitala.
billingPage.resumeFailed: Ua le mafai ona toe fa'afouina lau saofaga
billingPage.promoHint: O le a otometi lava ona faʻaaogaina le faʻaitiitiga pe a e lesitala mo se fuafuaga pe faʻatau ni minute faʻaopoopo.
billingPage.promoInvalid: E le aoga le promo code
billingPage.checkoutNoUrl: E le'i maua le URL o le Stripe Checkout
billingPage.checkoutFailed: Ua le mafai ona tatala le totogi: {{error}}
billingPage.topupCarriedTooltip: O minute o lo'o fa'aauau mai le vaitaimi ua mavae. E fa'aaoga muamua.
billingPage.topupHelp: Fa'aopoopoga o le fa'ase'e fa'atau. E maua pe a iai se saofaga o lo'o galue.
billingPage.tierPlusSummary: Mo feutanaiga tumaoti ma tagata faigaluega tutoatasi
billingPage.tierStandardSummary: Mo 'au ma tagata e galulue fa'atasi
billingPage.tierEnterpriseSummary: Fa'aputuga atoa o le AI mo pisinisi
billingPage.featureCountWithMinutes: {{count}} minute o le faaliliuga i le masina
billingPage.featureLiveSubs: Fa'aulutala tusitusiga i le taimi moni
billingPage.featureSip: Telefoni SIP (ulufale mai ma alu ese)
billingPage.featureLearnHub: AI Learning Hub — ana lava gagana
billingPage.featureRollover: Aveina o minute i le masina a sau
billingPage.featureCRM: Kata a tagata fa'atau e otometi lava ona iloa
billingPage.featureTelegramAuth: Fa'atagaga Telegram + so'otaga i se kata
billingPage.featureCalendar: Kalena a Google - Taimi atofaina a le Kalani
billingPage.featureCRMExport: Auina atu i le CRM (Chatwoot + API)
billingPage.ctaContactWhatsApp: Fa'afeso'ota'i e ala i le WhatsApp
billingPage.whatsAppMessage: Talofa! Ua ou fiafia i le fuafuaga a le Enterprise VibeVox.
billingPage.searchLanguagesPlaceholder: Saili lau gagana - mo se faʻataʻitaʻiga, "Portuguese", "português", ru
billingPage.faqQ1: O le ā e tupu i minute e leʻi faʻaaogaina?
billingPage.faqA1: O minute e le fa'aaogaina e fa'aauau pea i le masina kalena e soso'o ai. E muta le aoga i le masina lona tolu.
billingPage.faqQ2: E mafai ona ou faaleaogaina la'u saofaga i soo se taimi?
billingPage.faqA2: Ioe. E mafai ona e faaleaogaina lau teugatupe patino i le na o le tasi le kiliki. O le vaitaimi ua uma ona totogi o le a faaauau pea seia oo i lona faaiuga.
billingPage.faqQ3: O a mea e aofia i le Enterprise?
billingPage.faqA3: Fa'aputuga atoa o le AI: kata a tagata fa'atau ma le otometi lava ona iloa, fa'atagaga a le Telegram, fa'atonuga fa'apitoa, Kalena Google, fa'ailogaina o mana'oga atamai, auina atu i fafo o le CRM, feso'ota'iga ma le questflow.pro, ma se isi tab pulega.
billingPage.faqQ4: O fea le kamupani e tuʻuina atu telefoni SIP e te manaʻomia?
billingPage.faqA4: So'o se mea e tausisia le RFC: Zadarma, OnlinePBX, Asterisk/FreePBX, ma isi. E otometi lava ona faia e VibeVox se outbound trunk.
billingPage.topupDescription: €0.17 i le minute. Mai le 60 minute i le 10 itula. E maua loa le totogi pe a uma ona totogi.
billingPage.discountWithPromo: fa'atasi ai ma se fa'aitiitiga o le -{{percent}}% fa'atasi ai ma le promo code {{code}}
billingPage.cancelDetailNoRefund: E le toe faafoi mai tupe.
billingPage.cancelDetailActiveUntil: O le a tumau pea le aoga o le saofaga se'ia o'o i le {{date}}.
billingPage.cancelDetailMinutesAvailable: O lo'o avanoa minute o lafoga se'ia o'o i lenei aso; e mafai ona fa'atau ni minute fa'aopoopo.
billingPage.cancelDetailAutoClose: A maeʻa lena, o le a tapunia otometi lava le lesitala.
billingPage.autoRenewCancelledHeading: Ua faaleaogaina le faafouga otometi · o le a tapunia le lesitala {{date}}
billingPage.autoRenewCancelledHint: E aoga minute o lau fuafuaga se'ia o'o i lenei aso; e mafai ona e fa'atau ni minute fa'aopoopo. Kiliki le "Toe Fa'aauau" pe afai e te suia lou mafaufau.
billingPage.yearlySavings: Se'i fa'asaoina le €59 i le tausaga (2 masina e leai se totogi)
billingPage.languagesLead: O se lisi atoa o gagana e lagolagoina e le faaliliuga tutusa i le taimi moni. Iloa otometi le gagana puna—e filifili e tagata auai taʻitasi a latou lava gagana.
billingPage.languagesNoResults: E le'i maua le gagana i le lisi o gagana e lagolagoina.
billingPage.languagesNoResultsHint: Taumafai i se sipelaga ese—mo se faʻataʻitaʻiga, i le Igilisi poʻo le alafapeta a le atunuʻu. Afai e mautinoa lava e misi le gagana, taʻu mai ia i matou, ma o le a matou faʻaopoopoina.

seo.title: VibeVox — Fa'aliliuga AI i le taimi moni mo vala'au vitio ma le SIP
seo.description: O le VibeVox o se fa'avae fa'aliliu leo e fa'aaogaina ai le AI e lagolagoina ai le silia ma le 100 gagana. O lo'o maua fo'i vala'au vitio, telefoni SIP, talatalanoaga a tagata fa'atau, ma le au'ili'iliga o talanoaga e fa'aaogaina ai le AI.
seo.keywords: Faaliliuga AI, faaliliuga tutusa, valaau vitio ma faaliliuga, telefoni SIP, faaliliu leo

pwaInstall.name: VibeVox
pwaInstall.description: O le VibeVox o se faaliliu upu fa'apitoa (AI) mo telefoni leo ma vitio i gagana e 108. E mafai ona fa'aogaina le WebRTC ma le SIP telefoni, fesoasoani leo, ma le fa'aliliuga i le taimi moni i so'o se masini.
pwaInstall.installCta: Fa'aopoopo le VibeVox i lau lau autu—valaau fa'atasi ai ma le fa'aliliuga, SIP, ma se fesoasoani AI i le tasi le pa'i. E galue e pei o se polokalama masani.
pwaInstall.buttonSubtitle: Alu i le lau autu - fa'alauiloa i le tasi tap
pwaInstall.buttonAria: Fa'apipi'i le VibeVox e fai ma polokalama
